lines: The Fever are 9‑7, third in the Eastern Conference, and host the Phoenix Mercury tonight at 8 PM ET.
Caitlin Clark averages about 21 points a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 yesterday and will play the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders at home tomorrow at 7:05 PM ET.
escape_hatch: you follow this way closer than I do.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Monday, June 22. The Fever are 9‑7, third in the Eastern Conference, and host the Phoenix Mercury tonight at 8 PM ET. Caitlin Clark averages about 21 points a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers. The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 yesterday and will play the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders at home tomorrow at 7:05 PM ET. And if it gets away from you, your out is: you follow this way closer than I do.
